## Query

What did you ask Repostitch?

## What result helped

Which verdict or repo recommendation was useful?

## Why it was good

What part created trust or saved time?

## Did you use the pack?

If yes, did `Pack for Codex` help in a real workflow?

## Anything we can quote?

If you are okay with it, share a short quote we can use as feedback.
